article_title: ASP.NET Core Controller 实战：把 REST 端点写清楚
core_theme: ASP.NET Core controller 如何接收 HTTP 请求、调用业务服务并返回规范响应
reader_takeaway: 读者能理解 ControllerBase、ApiController、ActionResult、模型绑定、依赖注入和薄控制器的基本写法
summary_angle: 把 controller 画成轻量协调层：请求进来，服务处理，响应出去

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 ControllerBase vs Controller 章节说明 Web API 通常使用 ControllerBase
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中央控制台接收 REST 请求卡片

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 The [ApiController] Attribute 章节说明自动模型验证和绑定来源推断
information_blocks.visual_idea: 控制台上方出现校验印章和绑定箭头

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Action Results 章节列出 Ok、CreatedAtAction、NoContent、NotFound、Conflict 等结果
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧输出不同颜色的 HTTP 响应卡片

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Keeping Controllers Thin 章节强调 controller 只协调请求、服务和响应
information_blocks.visual_idea: 业务逻辑被放在后方服务模块中，controller 本身保持小而清晰

main_metaphor: 小型调度台把 REST 请求交给服务层，再把结构化响应送回客户端
primary_subject: 一个简洁的 controller 调度台
subject_action: 正在把请求卡片导向服务通道并输出响应卡片
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: energetic shonen-inspired manga look, clean ink lines, dynamic poses, readable action rhythm, bright restrained color accents
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，本篇从风格池随机选中；教程型内容适合用有推进感的动作节奏表达请求流转
style_safety_note: 该风格为泛类型描述，不涉及具体品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻
draft_goal: 验证 controller 作为轻量协调层的主题是否清楚
revision_targets: 让请求到响应的路径更清楚
final_prompt: Use case: infographic-story. Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article. Theme: ASP.NET Core controllers for REST endpoints. Summary angle: one clean controller as the small coordination layer between incoming REST requests and business services. Narrative flow: 3-beat process. Keep one dominant focal subject and 3-4 supporting narrative beats. Information blocks: 控制器, 自动校验, 状态码, 薄控制器. Main metaphor: a compact command desk that routes REST request cards into service lanes and response cards. Style: editorial technical illustration with energetic shonen-inspired manga look, clean ink lines, dynamic poses, readable action rhythm, bright restrained color accents. Wide 2.35:1 frame. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI, no fake charts, no watermark.
